title: Bound Tools
body:
<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube.com/embed/EpquIrlT_rQ" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture" allowfullscreen></iframe>

Adds spell-like items that summon tools at the cost of XP. Inspired by Skyrim.
Hold Right click to charge the spell, release to summon the tool at the cost of some XP.
Sneak right click to change the target tool.
Every tool comes pre-enchanted.

![infographic](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/xvZkGRvl/images/1359139fe8aef3c18200d85381437d43142f6f1e.png)
Craft with a wooden sword, pick, axe, shovel, hoe and bow with an amethyst, quartz and emerald.

![crafting recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/xvZkGRvl/images/39b61139ec04ac1c32b63b369976d645a4b10fc9.png)
